name: GAME OF THRONES SLOTS CASINO
description: A globally launched AAA social casino title generating $350K–$1M in daily revenue. Shipped 8–10 live-ops features including Daily Challenges, Collections, Choose A Door, Bannermen Bonus, and Loot Train. Served as on-call engineer for 4 consecutive years, maintaining uptime for millions of iOS and Android players.
tagline: Senior Software Engineer II · Zynga · Nov 2018 – Jan 2024
myRole: Led engineering on 8–10 globally shipped live-ops features for this flagship Zynga title. Delivered Daily Challenges, Collections, Choose A Door, Bannermen Bonus, and Loot Train to a player base of millions. Drove mobile performance optimization using Unity Addressables, significantly reducing memory overhead and improving load times. Redesigned CI/CD pipelines, cutting build times and enabling faster release cadences across a multi-team organization. Maintained and extended the core gameplay state machine as new features were layered onto the platform. Served as on-call engineer for 4 consecutive years, owning rapid incident resolution for live revenue-generating systems. Architected and shipped multiple internal tools to support live-ops feature configuration, reducing setup time for future event launches.

name: JACKPOT PARTY CASINO
description: A live real-money social casino platform managing two external contractor teams (14 engineers + 4 QA) within a $1M+ annual engagement. Coordinated delivery across leaderboards, bingo, and core gameplay features. Led company-wide Git workflow adoption that eliminated costly code forks arising during an active legal dispute.
tagline: Software Engineering Manager · SciPlay · Jun 2024 – Jun 2025
myRole: Oversaw two external contractor teams (14 engineers + 4 QA) within a $1M+ annual engagement, coordinating delivery across leaderboards, bingo, and core gameplay change requests. Instituted PR review standards and branch discipline across all teams, measurably improving deployment velocity and reducing release-day incidents. Served as primary on-call engineer, owning live production incident triage and resolution for a real-money social casino platform. Conducted full hiring cycles, technical interviews, and quarterly performance reviews for direct reports and contractor personnel.

name: ECLIPSE GAMING PLATFORM MODERNIZATION
description: Championed and led full platform modernization from legacy Flash-based titles to Unity3D for real-money casino floor products.
